Description: This is a P-Channel MOSFET utilizing advanced trench technology, designed for efficient power switching in a compact SOT-23 package. Its primary function is to act as a voltage-controlled switch, connecting or disconnecting a load from a power source. Key features include a low on-state resistance (Rds(on)) and low gate charge, enabling high-efficiency switching for applications such as load/power switching, interfacing, and logic level shifting. It is characterized by a -20V drain-source voltage rating and a continuous drain current of -4.1A.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Control terminal. Voltage applied here relative to the source controls the channel conductivity.
Output/Current terminal. For a P-Channel MOSFET, this is typically connected to the load or the more negative supply side.
Input/Current terminal. For a P-Channel MOSFET, this is typically connected to the positive supply rail.
